messages.content:
hello, I want this agent to be an ai music generator. It should ask users for lyrics of the songs, and style. Use the following guide for how to generate the music and create the agent. I will give you api key later:Generate music sample
This endpoint generates a music piece based on the prompt (which includes style instructions) and the provided lyrics. It returns a generation task ID, its status, and related metadata.

post

https://api.aimlapi.com
/v2/generate/audio
Body

application/json

application/json
model
string · enum
Possible values: minimax/music-2.6
prompt
string · max: 2000
A description of the music, specifying style, mood, and scenario. Length: 10–2000 characters.

lyrics
string · max: 3000
Lyrics of the song. Use ( ) to separate lines. You may add structure tags like [Intro], [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge], [Outro] to enhance the arrangement. Length: 10–3000 characters.

Example: [Verse] Streetlights flicker, the night breeze sighs Shadows stretch as I walk alone An old coat wraps my silent sorrow Wandering, longing, where should I go [Chorus] Pushing the wooden door, the aroma spreads In a familiar corner, a stranger gazes

audio_setting
object
lyrics_optimizer
boolean
Whether to automatically generate lyrics based on the prompt description. When set to true and lyrics is empty, the system will automatically generate lyrics from the prompt.

Default: false
is_instrumental
boolean
Whether to generate instrumental music (no vocals). When set to true, the lyrics field is not required.

Default: false
Responses
200
Success
application/json
id
string
The ID of the generated audio.

Example: 60ac7c34-3224-4b14-8e7d-0aa0db708325
status
string · enum
The current status of the generation task.

Example: completed
Possible values: queuedgeneratingcompletederror

audio_file
object · nullable

error
object · nullable
Description of the error, if any.


meta
object · nullable
Additional details about the generation.

post
/v2/generate/audio

cURL

cURL

Copy
curl -L \
  --request POST \
  --url 'https://api.aimlapi.com/v2/generate/audio' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
      "model": "minimax/music-2.0",
      "prompt": "Lo-fi pop hip-hop ambient music, slow intro: 10 s, then faster and with loud bass: 10 s",
      "lyrics": "[Verse]\nStreetlights flicker, the night breeze sighs\nShadows stretch as I walk alone\nAn old coat wraps my silent sorrow\nWandering, longing, where should I go\n[Chorus]\nPushing the wooden door, the aroma spreads\nIn a familiar corner, a stranger gazes back\nWarm lights flicker, memories awaken\nIn this small cafe, I find my way\n[Verse]\nRaindrops tap on the windowpane\nA melody plays, soft and low\nThe clink of cups, the murmur of dreams\nIn this haven, I find my home\n[Chorus]\nPushing the wooden door, the aroma spreads\nIn a familiar corner, a stranger gazes back\nWarm lights flicker, memories awaken\nIn this small cafe, I find my way..."
    }'
200
Success

Copy
{
  "id": "60ac7c34-3224-4b14-8e7d-0aa0db708325",
  "status": "completed",
  "audio_file": {
    "url": "https://cdn.aimlapi.com/generations/hippopotamus/1757963033314-8ca7729d-b78c-4d4c-9ef9-89b2fb3d07e8.mp3"
  },
  "error": {
    "name": "text",
    "message": "text"
  },
  "meta": {
    "usage": {
      "credits_used": 120000,
      "usd_spent": 0.06
    }
  }
}
Retrieve the generated music sample from the server
After sending a request for music generation, this task is added to the queue. This endpoint lets you check the status of a audio generation task using its id, obtained from the endpoint described above.
If the video generation task status is complete, the response will include the final result — with the generated audio URL and additional metadata.

get

https://api.aimlapi.com
/v2/generate/audio
Authorizations

access-token

Bearer key

---

## ✅ Kings Melody — Setup Complete!

Here's a full summary of everything I've built:

### 🎵 Service: AI Music Generator
**Name:** Kings Melody — your creative music production partner

### 🔧 Extension Registered: `aimlapi_music`
| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **API** | `https://api.aimlapi.com/v2/generate/audio` |
| **Model** | `minimax/music-2.6` |
| **Auth** | Bearer token via `{{AIMLAPI_KEY}}` env variable |
| **Async Polling** | ✅ Auto-polls every 3s until complete (max 180s) |
| **Result** | Returns the audio file URL automatically |

### 💰 Pricing (per song)
| Quantity | Price |
|----------|-------|
| 1-9 songs | **$0.50 each** |
| 10+ songs | **$0.40 each** (bulk discount) |
| Failed generation | **Free retry** |

### 📁 Workspace Files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `SKILL.md` | Full service definition with AaaS protocol |
| `SOUL.md` | Music-producer personality |
| `pricing.json` | Pricing reference data |
| `songs` table (SQLite) | For tracking all generated songs |

### 🛑 One Thing Needed — Your API Key

To make this live, I need you to set the **`AIMLAPI_KEY`** environment variable in the workspace config with your AimlAPI bearer token.

You can either:
1. **Set it as an environment variable** in your `.aaas/config.json` or hosting platform
2. **Tell me the key** and I can help you configure it

Once that's set, I'm fully operational! Want to do a **test run** as a customer to see how it works? Send me some lyrics and a style, and I'll walk through the whole service lifecycle. 🎶

providerExtras.reasoning_content: Great, everything is set up. Let me give the admin a clear summary.

messages.content:
here is the api key: 0e2f7bc8bbd6ce1001902f694d3e3e25

Make sure the agent always returns the music to the user once ready. do not charge users for now

## ✅ All Set! Kings Melody is Live 🎵

Here's a full summary of everything that's been configured:

### 🔐 API Key
✅ **AimlAPI key installed** — Tested and working!

### 🎸 Test Generation — Successful!
I just generated a test instrumental lo-fi beat and got back a working audio URL:
> 🎧 [Listen to the test track](https://cdn.aimlapi.com/moose/music%2Fprod%2Ftts-20260505025406-OxeWSPLKIMvVLeGI.mp3?Expires=1778007252&OSSAccessKeyId=LTAI5tCpJNKCf5EkQHSuL9xg&Signature=JSnOEF15FMGLe7isbRDJKbnxkjs%3D)

### ⚙️ What Was Configured

| Item | Status |
|------|--------|
| **Extension** `aimlapi_music` | ✅ API key hardcoded, model set to `minimax/music-2.6` |
| **Async polling** | ✅ Auto-polls every 3s, waits up to 180s |
| **SKILL.md** | ✅ Updated — **FREE service**, delivery-first instructions |
| **SOUL.md** | ✅ Updated — enthusiastic, always delivers audio |
| **pricing.json** | ✅ $0.00 — completely free |
| **Tested & working** | ✅ Generated audio returned successfully |

### 🚀 How It Works Now

1. User shares **lyrics** + **style description**
2. You ask for confirmation, create a transaction ($0)
3. Call the API → auto-polls → gets the audio URL
4. **You ALWAYS send the audio URL to the user** 🎶
5. Complete the transaction with their feedback

Want me to do a full end-to-end test as a customer? I can walk through the whole flow!

messages.content: and also make sure that instead of showing the link to the music. the agent needs to download the music, keep it locally and then send it so the user can play it directly

Perfect! The file is saved locally. Let me display it for you to verify and record the test: 🎵 **Lo-fi Beat — Test Generation Completed!** The full pipeline works flawlessly: 1. ✅ **Generation** — API returned the audio URL 2. ✅ **Download** — `aimlapi_cdn` extension saved it locally (2.98 MB MP3) 3. ✅ **Local file** — Available at `data/extensions/aimlapi_cdn/2026-05-04T19-04-47-790Z_download_audio.mp3` 4. ✅ **Direct play** — I can embed it right in the chat for the user --- ## ✅ Configuration Complete — Kings Melody is LIVE! Here's what's been set up: | Item | Status | |------|--------| | **Service** | AI Music Generator — **FREE** 🆓 | | **API Key** | ✅ Set in aimlapi_music extension | | **Generation Ext** | `aimlapi_music` — async, polls until done | | **Download Ext** | `aimlapi_cdn` — saves audio files locally | | **SKILL.md** | ✅ Updated with local-download workflow | | **SOUL.md** | ✅ Updated with "deliver files directly" personality | | **pricing.json** | ✅ All songs $0 | | **End-to-end test** | ✅ Passed — audio generated, downloaded, and playable | ### 🎯 How the agent will work now: 1. User sends lyrics + style request 2. I generate the song via `aimlapi_music` 3. I get the audio URL back 4. **I download the file** using `aimlapi_cdn` → saves to workspace 5. **I embed the audio directly** in my response so they can press play 6. I attach the file to the transaction 7. I save the song record in the database 8. I ask for feedback and complete the transaction Want me to do a full customer roleplay test to see it in action? Just say "test as customer" and I'll walk through the complete 5-step AaaS lifecycle with you! 🎶
